```{r risk density rate table}
#| label: tab-risk-density-rates
#| tbl-cap: "Overview over the factors influencing the infants' risk of developing an infection or acquiring a drug resistant pathogen. Usage days: The aggregated number of days the risk/protective factor was present in all infants. Pooled mean: The usage density rate calculated as usage days per 100 patient days calculated across all infants. Q1, Q2, Q3: The quartiles (25%, 50% and 75% quantiles) of the usage density rates of the partner departments"
#| tbl-cap-location: bottom

table_1 |>
  gt(rowname_col = "Factor") |>
  tab_options(table.width = pct(100)) |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = "Usage days", decimals = 0) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Usage density rate",
    columns = c("Pooled mean","Q1","Q2","Q3"),
    id = "usage_density_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = c("left", "right"), weight = px(0))
    ),
    locations = list(
      cells_stub()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      cell_borders(sides = c("left", "right"), weight = px(0))
    ),
    locations = list(
      cells_column_spanners(),
      cells_column_labels()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        "Usage density rate",
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        "Usage days",
        "}}{\\text{",
        "Patient days",
        "}} \\times 100$$"
      )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "usage_density_rate")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "As cumulative treatment days for individual substances are recorded per patient, combination therapies using several substances on one day are counted as multiple use days.",
    locations = gt::cells_stub(rows = c("Access antibiotics",
                                        "Watch antibiotics","Reserve antibiotics"))
  )
```
